note: The about:gjoa settings registry. gjoa's single settings home. Each setting is a live pref (present + reversible). Costs are MEASURED, characterized as real EGRESS endpoints, or honestly 'unmeasured' — never invented. The `leaves` of a profile are the exact prefs it flips, kept in sync with GjoaLoader's PROFILES by preflight Gate N. Firefox's own settings stay in Firefox Settings; this is gjoa's surface.

profiles.title: LibreWolf mode
profiles.claim: LibreWolf-grade privacy DEFAULTS, as one toggle.
profiles.disclaimer: NOT 'as secure as LibreWolf'. These prefs are only part of LibreWolf's hardening (their compile-time disables and ~20 C++ patches are not here), and flipping this changes none of gjoa's own added surface (the adblock classifier, content actors, custom about: pages).

tradeoffs.title: resistFingerprinting has a high UX cost
tradeoffs.detail: Breaks canvas-reliant sites, letterboxes the window, reports UTC timezone + a generic UA. Default-off for a reason; on only inside this profile.

tradeoffs.title: Safe Browsing stays ON (conflict, not flipped)
tradeoffs.detail: LibreWolf neuters Safe Browsing, but gjoa deliberately KEPT download-reputation on (security finding F5). LibreWolf mode does NOT disable it here — the conflict is surfaced, not silently resolved.

tradeoffs.title: Prefetch stays ON (gjoa speed decision)
tradeoffs.detail: LibreWolf disables prefetch/dns-prefetch; gjoa keeps them on for page-load speed. Not changed by this profile.

settings.title: Mode
settings.help: How pages are darkened (auto = color-scheme only; hybrid = native-where-available + invert-the-rest).

settings.title: Scrim strength
settings.help: 0-255; higher = darker scrim over un-themed pages.

settings.title: Image-analysis refinement
settings.help: Optional polish; off by default (unverified refinement on top of the correctness floor).

settings.title: Allow-list (hosts)
settings.help: Comma-separated hosts to exempt from blocking (your own allow-list). Empty = block everywhere.

settings.title: List-driven scriptlets
settings.help: SECURITY: off = only curated baseline scriptlets run; on allows arbitrary +js() injection from your filter lists. Leave off unless you trust your lists.

measurement.basis: A security gate (finding F2), not a perf knob.

sections.title: Reversible features (debloat)
sections.intro: Firefox subsystems gjoa disables by default - present and reversible. gjoa never deletes a capability; it parks it behind a knob. These are EGRESS/feature toggles, not memory knobs - so the honest cost is the network endpoint each would re-contact if you toggle it on (documented Firefox behaviour), not an invented perf number. Idle-memory deltas remain unmeasured; they are not the relevant axis here.

measurement.basis: Firefox submits telemetry pings to incoming.telemetry.mozilla.org. Off in gjoa, so it never fires; toggling on re-enables that egress. Idle CPU/memory of the telemetry subsystem is unmeasured (not the relevant cost).
Firefox Health Report uploads to incoming.telemetry.mozilla.org. The cost is the data sent, not memory.

Pocket fetches recommendations/sponsored content from getpocket endpoints (surfaced on the stock new-tab, which gjoa replaces anyway). Feature toggle; no saving exists for a feature that was never running.
Disables Sync (accounts.firefox.com). Feature loss, not a measured perf win - egress only occurs if you actively sign in.
The add-ons recommendation service (TAAR) sends usage signals to services.addons.mozilla.org. Egress vector; memory cost unmeasured.
Normandy pulls remote experiment/recipe definitions from normandy.cdn.mozilla.net and can flip prefs remotely. Disabling it removes both that egress and remote mutation of your build.
Sponsored-tile placement is fetched from contile.services.mozilla.com. No functional cost (custom new-tab); the cost is the egress.

links.title: Sovereignty - egress proof
links.desc: The source-derived list of every point this build reaches the network, checked against the build you're running. A proof, not a setting.

links.title: Raw preferences
links.desc: Every gjoa.* and Firefox pref, raw. The expert escape hatch - each setting above shows its pref name to search here.
